name: nowledge-mem
description: Cross-tool memory for Kimi Code. Recall past decisions, search prior threads, and keep Kimi Code sessions searchable in Nowledge Mem.
skillInstructions: Use Nowledge Mem for durable cross-tool memory. Prefer MCP tools when they are connected; use nmem CLI as the fallback and for real Kimi Code transcript import.

interface.shortDescription: Memory that follows you across Kimi Code and your other AI tools
interface.longDescription: Loads startup context, guides memory retrieval and distillation, and can sync Kimi Code conversations into Nowledge Mem threads through the explicit hook installer.
